mapper.select: select s.id as step_id, s.pipeline_instance_id, s.step_code, s.stage_code, pr.processed_count as rows_processed, null::bigint as total_rows_hint, pr.updated_at as last_heartbeat_at from batch.pipeline_step_run s join batch.pipeline_instance p on p.id = s.pipeline_instance_id left join batch.pipeline_progress pr on pr.tenant_id = p.tenant_id and pr.pipeline_instance_id = s.pipeline_instance_id and pr.stage = s.stage_code where p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and s.pipeline_instance_id = #{pipelineInstanceId} order by s.run_seq asc, s.id asc
